hero.title: Tibhirine 10KM Race
hero.subtitle: A modern race management platform for registrations, athlete management, results, and full event administration.

raceInfo.title: Race information
raceInfo.description: The Tibhirine 10KM Race is designed as a premium sporting experience with complete digital management, stronger security, and a modern multilingual interface.
rules: Each participant must provide payment proof.
Phone number is the unique registration identifier.
Only approved athletes appear in the public list.
Categories are calculated automatically from age and gender.

footer.text: © 2026 Tibhirine 10KM Race – Draa Essamar, Médéa, Algeria.
